title: Senior Backend Engineer (.NET, AWS | Chinese-speaking)
description:
Location: MacPherson (on-site)

Looking for a senior backend engineer to take end-to-end ownership of an existing backend platform. This role is highly hands-on and focuses on improving code quality, stability, and architecture over time rather than building greenfield systems. You will act as the technical anchor for backend engineering, leading by example while working closely with a small team and cross-functional partners.

This position is best suited for engineers who enjoy improving real, production systems and taking responsibility for backend outcomes.

Key Responsibilities

  • Own and actively develop backend services and APIs built on C# / .NET, with a strong focus on maintainability and reliability.
  • Take responsibility for the overall health of the backend system, including architecture decisions, code quality, and technical direction.
  • Incrementally refactor and improve existing backend components to address technical debt, performance issues, and scalability constraints.
  • Design, review, and optimize relational database structures and queries to support production workloads.
  • Operate and improve backend infrastructure on AWS, ensuring systems are stable, observable, and cost-effective.
  • Work closely with mobile engineers to ensure backend services support application performance, feature delivery, and scalability needs.
  • Provide technical guidance, code reviews, and day-to-day support to a small backend team, while remaining deeply hands-on.
  • Collaborate with product and QA teams to deliver enhancements and fixes from development through production release.
  • Monitor live systems, troubleshoot production issues, and drive root-cause analysis and long-term fixes.
  • Establish and reinforce practical engineering standards, documentation, and best practices across the backend codebase.


Requirements

  • 5+ years of experience in backend engineering with significant hands-on responsibility.
  • Strong practical experience building backend services using C# and .NET / .NET Core, including RESTful API design and implementation.
  • Proven experience maintaining and improving existing backend systems.
  • Solid understanding of relational databases and experience optimizing queries, schemas, and performance under real production load.
  • Hands-on experience operating backend services on AWS, with exposure to services such as EC2, RDS, S3, IAM, and CloudWatch.
  • Experience working with containerized workloads using Docker, and familiarity with modern deployment and release practices.
  • Fluency in Chinese (spoken) to collaborate with China-based team members.
  • Strong debugging skills and a pragmatic approach to problem-solving.
  • Ability to take ownership, make technical decisions, and be accountable for backend outcomes.
  • Experience mentoring/leading a small team of backend engineers.

Nice to Have

  • Exposure to infrastructure-as-code tools such as Terraform.
  • Experience with mobile application.

postedCompany.description:
Evolution Recruitment Solutions are an award winning, specialist IT and Digital recruitment consultancy with offices in Singapore, Sydney, UK, Germany and US. Formed in 2000 we have helped thousands of IT and Digital professionals secure their next Permanent, Contract or Interim position with companies ranging from SME to multinationals. Our professional and quality driven approach has led to Evolution being regularly recommended to others.  

Evolution have received a number of awards in recognition of the outstanding training, development and support we provide to our consultants which in turn results in a higher level of service for both applicants and clients:
